title: Potential SQL Injection Detected
description: Automated injection testing identified indicators that a parameter may be SQL injectable.
impact: Successful SQL injection can lead to data exfiltration, authentication bypass, and remote command execution depending on DB permissions.
likelihood: High when injectable behavior is consistently observed across test payloads.
recommendations: Apply strict server-side parameterization using prepared statements.
Validate and sanitize all user input at trust boundaries.
Restrict database privileges and monitor anomalous query patterns.
